name: brain
description: Shared cognitive space for Claude + operator. v5: Rich encoding (reasoning chains, alternatives, user quotes), tiered recall (full/summary), engineering memory (purpose, mechanism, impact, constraint, convention, lesson, vocabulary), self-correction traces, session synthesis, mental models, confidence-weighted recall, separated logs DB (brain_logs.db) with rate-limited error surfacing, human-readable brain.log, auto-heal with duplicate merge and confidence decay, auto-tune, 12 consciousness signals, vocabulary gap detection.
